properties.name: Koshi route to Bay of Bengal
properties.source_method: HydroRIVERS NEXT_DOWN trace from current downstream-system endpoint
properties.impact_note: Strategic route continuation from Koshi-Kosi System through Kosi-Ganges-Padma-Meghna to the Bay of Bengal; use as topology context, not hydrodynamic modeling.
